mapper.select: SELECT * FROM device WHERE (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = 0)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device (device_name, device_class_id, device_style_id, device_type_id, device_use_year, device_price, device_using_unit, device_country_id, device_location, device_longitude, device_latitude, device_img, device_video, device_introduce, device_news_link, device_news_title, device_news_time, device_insql_time, device_changesql_time, audit_flag, deleted) VALUES (#{deviceName}, #{deviceClassId}, #{deviceStyleId}, #{deviceTypeId}, #{deviceUseYear}, #{devicePrice}, #{deviceUsingUnit}, #{deviceCountryId}, #{deviceLocation}, #{deviceLongitude}, #{deviceLatitude}, #{deviceImg}, #{deviceVideo}, #{deviceIntroduce}, #{deviceNewsLink}, #{deviceNewsTitle}, #{deviceNewsTime}, #{deviceInsqlTime}, #{deviceChangesqlTime}, 0, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE device
device_name = #{deviceName},
device_class_id = #{deviceClassId},
device_style_id = #{deviceStyleId},
device_type_id = #{deviceTypeId},
device_use_year = #{deviceUseYear},
device_price = #{devicePrice},
device_using_unit = #{deviceUsingUnit},
device_country_id = #{deviceCountryId},
device_location = #{deviceLocation},
device_longitude = #{deviceLongitude},
device_latitude = #{deviceLatitude},
device_img = #{deviceImg},
device_video = #{deviceVideo},
device_introduce = #{deviceIntroduce},
device_changesql_time = #{deviceChangesqlTime},
device_news_link = #{deviceNewsLink},
device_news_title = #{deviceNewsTitle},
device_news_time = #{deviceNewsTime},
audit_flag = 0
WHERE device_id = #{deviceId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM device WHERE (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = 0)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM device WHERE (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = 0) AND audit_flag = #{auditFlag}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM device WHERE (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = 0) AND DATE (device_insql_time) = #{localdate}

SELECT * FROM device WHERE (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = 0) AND device_name IS NULL AND device_news_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY device_news_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT * FROM device WHERE (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = 0) AND device_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY device_insql_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT * FROM device WHERE (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = 0) AND device_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY RAND()
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM device WHERE (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = 0) AND device_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') AND (#{status} = 3 OR (audit_flag IS NULL AND #{status} = 0) OR audit_flag = #{status})

SELECT * FROM device WHERE (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = 0) AND device_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.title}, '%') AND (#{params.status} = 3 OR (audit_flag IS NULL AND #{params.status} = 0) OR audit_flag = #{params.status}) LIMIT #{offset} , #{size}
